title: Pistachio Bao Bites
description: A sweet and savory twist on traditional bao, these bite-sized treats are perfect for snacking. The combination of crunchy pistachios and soft bao dough is a game-changer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the pistachio flour, all-purpose flour, granulated sugar, and unsalted butter. Mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the bao dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of the pistachio dough mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with the beaten egg and fold the dough over to form a half-moon shape.
Press the edges together to seal the bao bite.
Brush the tops of the bao bites with the beaten egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
